criteria.reason: Overview and bundle now center Current scope, and the action row leads to working file/workspace/prompt/diagram flows.
Internal counters are demoted into Diagnostics and duplicate primary-looking bundle surfaces were removed.
Search now has explicit All/Files/Knowledge separation plus mode, scope, kind controls, and live Papyrus-code search works even with scope=current.
Prompt generation uses the selected Current scope with the two required scenarios.
Snapshot creation uses progressive disclosure and now includes optional control and insert enrichments.
Changes remain localized to the intended UI/server files without dark-mode scope creep.

commands_run: restart python3 -m lsa.cli serve --no-open --port 18903 and verify / in headless Chrome plus /api/snapshot/select, /api/plan, /api/file, /api/prompt, /api/plan/mermaid, /api/workspace/create, /api/search, /api/snapshots, and /static/app.js
